description: Detects excessive imports, parameter overload, and low class cohesion in TypeScript. Simplified from Rust: flags all import_statement nodes (without counting against threshold >15) and all formal_parameters nodes (without checking parameter count >5). Low cohesion (no `this` access) not detectable in JSON DSL. Language scoped to typescript only.

flag.message: import statement detected -- if the total exceeds 15, consider splitting this module to reduce coupling
